description: Professional UI redesign - upgrade colors, typography, spacing, and overall visual polish across all pages. Change from basic yellow/gray theme to a more professional blue/slate color scheme with better gradients, card depth, spacing, and modern input styling.
steps: Update src/app/globals.css to add custom CSS variables for the new professional color palette, smooth font rendering settings, and any global utility classes needed.

Redesign src/components/Sidebar.tsx - change from dark gray bg-gray-900 to a professional gradient sidebar (slate-900 to slate-800), add a proper logo area with gradient accent, improve nav item styling with better hover/active states using indigo/blue tones instead of yellow, add subtle border styling.
Redesign src/components/MobileNav.tsx - match the new sidebar color scheme, improve mobile menu appearance with backdrop blur and smoother transitions.
Redesign src/app/layout.tsx - update body background, improve overall layout spacing and use Inter or system font stack.

Redesign src/app/page.tsx (Dashboard) - improve KPI cards with gradient accents, better shadow depth, subtle border coloring per card type, improve header area with a welcome message and date display.

Redesign src/app/facturas/page.tsx - improve table styling with better row hover states, upgrade status badges with more polished styling, improve the header area and button styling to use blue/indigo primary color.

Redesign src/app/facturas/nueva/page.tsx - improve form card styling with better borders and focus states, upgrade buttons to use indigo/blue primary, improve the line items section with better visual separation.

Redesign src/app/facturas/[id]/page.tsx - improve the invoice detail view with better card styling, improve the header/FACTURA title area, better TicketBAI info display section, improve action buttons.
Redesign src/app/clientes/page.tsx - improve search bar styling, upgrade table appearance, improve form card when adding/editing clients.
Redesign src/app/presupuestos/page.tsx - improve table styling consistent with facturas page.
Redesign src/app/comunicaciones/page.tsx - improve the two-column layout cards, better message type selector buttons, improve communication history items.
Redesign src/app/agenda/page.tsx - improve visit cards with better status indicators, improve the form for new visits.
acceptance_criteria: All pages use a cohesive professional color scheme (blues/indigo/slate instead of plain yellow/gray)
Cards have proper shadows, borders, and spacing giving depth
Input fields have improved focus states with ring styling
Status badges look polished with subtle gradients or improved coloring
Sidebar looks professional with gradient or improved dark theme
Typography is crisp with proper hierarchy (font sizes, weights, colors)
npx next build completes without errors
verification: Run `npx next build` in /projects/sandbox/electricista-app and confirm successful build
findings: Build passes cleanly. Dashboard KPI cards are now clickable links that navigate to respective pages. Added recent invoices and upcoming visits detail sections to dashboard. All pages use consistent indigo/slate professional theme with reusable CSS component classes. User steering about Excel/Airtable and AI error handling are separate features outside this scope.
